projects.title: SKycast - A Weather Application
projects.description: Skycast is a polished weather web app that gives you instant, beautiful weather data for any city on Earth. No clutter, no noise just clean, clear conditions at a glance.

projects.title: BlipChat - A Chat Web Application
projects.description: BlipChat is a real-time, multi-room chat application that demonstrates how modern web technologies work together to create instant messaging experiences. Built with Flask and SocketIO, it serves as a practical learning example of full-stack web development with real-time features.

projects.title: Storeia - An Interactive Storytelling Platform
projects.description: Storeia is a collaborative, web-based interactive storytelling platform where writers can build branching "choose your own adventure" stories crafting scenes connected by choices that shape the narrative's direction.

projects.title: Snip - Url Shortener
projects.description: Snip is a url shortener application that shortens the url and provides a shortened and customizable link to the user. It also provides analytics for the shortened links.

projects.title: CTF Platform
projects.description: BASCTF is a beginner-friendly Capture The Flag platform built for Basilan State University . It provides an engaging, hands-on environment for students to learn cybersecurity concepts by solving challenges across various domains including cryptography, web security, forensics, and more.
